title: Bakushin Armpit GIF
about: The Bakushin Armpit GIF is an armpit fetish GIF depicting Uma Musume character Sakura Bakushin O having her armpit licked by Sakura Chiyono O under a Discord message that reads, "Bakushin armpit?" The GIF was originally posted by X / Twitter user @CoolchouZhao in early February 2026 and later deleted. It spread on social media over the following days, inspiring memes and fan art based on and referencing it.
origin:
On February 6th, 2026, X [1] user @CoolchouZhao posted a GIF that shows Uma Musume character Sakura Chiyono O licking Sakura Bakushin O's armpit under two Discord messages. The first message, sent by Coldchau Zhao, reads, "Bakushin armpit?" The reply, by Loopervergstropy, reads, "Yes." It is unclear how many interactions the post, which read, "I say when I don't have the heart to post this but that feeling sure wears off about 2 seconds later," gained before it was deleted.

The post and GIF were archived on Danbooru [2] that day.
